title: Let Monday Doc Column transfer when automating task to a new board

posts.author: Linds_26 (Lindsay Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have tried various ways to get the Monday Doc column to migrate into new boards as a task flows from one board to the next. When I set up an automation for “When status changes to __, create a task in __ board,” it doesn’t provide the option to copy the Monday Doc column to the new board I want to copy to. I have to first duplicate the task in the current board and move that one to the new board manually.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to copy a task to a new board but keep the original task in the original board as well. I need the Monday Doc to transfer as well as a great way to keep notes on projects to continuously update and reference no matter which board I’m in.
